Actions.Text: COMMITTEE DISCHARGED AND COMMITTED TO RULES

Title: Authorizes the Church of Pentecost, USA, Inc. to receive retroactive real property tax exempt status
Summary: Authorizes the Church of Pentecost, USA, Inc. to receive retroactive real property tax exempt status for parcels located in the county of Suffolk.
ActClause: AN ACT authorizing the Church of Pentecost, USA, Inc. to receive retroactive real property tax exempt status
